parameters: Please don't stare so much--... it's embarrassinggg....
I'm sorry, but... you're just so pretty down here,
I can't bring myself to take my eyes off.
Uuuuu--... I know it's a compliment, so it doesn't feel bad but....
Aah, how beautiful... it's like I'm in a dream.
...--. Aah, I'm sorry. Even though I was planning
on making you be the one to enjoy it today,
I ended up getting lost in it myself instead.
Uhm, uncle. Today, at the park, \n[1]....
Lately, even if we end up running into each other, we don't really talk anymore.
I think that event from the other day broke something inside me too.
Maybe it's just time to let go...
Even though I've been trying to do something about
these two's relationship... things just keep getting worse instead.
In the end, there wasn't a single thing I could really do.
...\n[1] won't talk to me about it either.
If only he would just rely on me a bit more... that's all I really wanted.
Even if it's in this twisted way.
Hey, uncle. Today... I want you to--
m-make me feel.... uhm. Make me feel really good.
If I keep doing this, would that help him forget the pain?
Don't say it's time to let go. There's still time, and ways to fix things.
If it's to that end, I don't mind being your relief.
A-Alright... I'll try my best. Well then--....
He ran his thumb over the slit of my vagina,
and started rubbing-in the already drenched and wet hole.
How is it? Are you enjoying it... Shino-kun?
Even as I felt guilty to \n[1] for answering with that,
His finger, stroking and caressing the most sensitive spot on my body,
forcefully drew out pleasure from my very depths, whether I liked it or not.
It's amazing, Shino-kun... more and more of your love juice keeps overflowing out...
Gosh--... don't say that--... please--... it's embarrassing--
Not at all, you're beautiful down here...
This is nothing but an act to satisfy uncle's sexual desires.
So I really shouldn't be feeling this way about it. I can't. It's wrong.
But even though it's wrong, and even though I shouldn't, my resolve
wavers with each stroke and caress of his finger.
I really shouldn't say it. Not unless he asks me.
Ah--... aaaah--... uncle--, it feels great--
And once I let go, it all came overflowing out.
The door to my heart that he already pried open, wasn't something I could close again.
I see, you really are enjoying this, huh... I'm sorry.
I'm sorry--... even though I shouldn't be enjoying this so much--...
Even though I'm the one who should be satisfying you--....
Nnn--... I'm sorry for wallowing in pleasure by myself--....
Sorry for--... craving your fingers.... aaaah--...
It's alright--, I'm almost about to hit my limit too....♥
Aah, Shino-kun... Shino-kun Shino-kun--... you're beautiful, so lovely...♥
His fingers got faster and faster, making soppy, squelching sounds.
Unable to hold back my moans, or keep my hips from rising,
all I could do was accept his actions with my quivering body.
As that situation went on, a change slowly came over me.
Aah--... I can't anymore--... I'm at--... my--... limit--....
But my voice didn't seem to be reaching him,
as he mindlessly just moved his fingers, as if possessed.
Hey--... uncle, are you liste--... ah--, ah--... no, no, no--....
My whole body went limp, and my vision started to flicker.
I was already way past my limit.
Nnnnn--... ah--.... aaaaaah--... I ca--... mmee--....--
Even as I climaxed, uncle's fingers didn't stop
I'm cumming so--... please--... please stoppp--....
Aaah--... I'm sorry, Shino-kun... what was I....
After a bit, he finally stopped his fingers, and apologized to me
with a face full of sorrow.
Sorry, I'm so sorry, Shino-kun... just saying that I lost
myself there isn't going to be a good excuse for this one...
Really, thinking about it, asking you to show me and do something
like this for me is just too much, what's even wrong with me?
...I really am sorry for everything, Shino-kun.
Maybe the sort of life he's lived caused him to become like this.
Thinking along those lines made my heart sting with pain.
Don't worry about it. If you're fine with me, I'll do it any... well, not 'anytime' but--
It's embarrassing but, I'll do the best I can.
Until you and \n[1], can laugh together again like you used to...
Not to mention, it's not just embarrassment either...
I'm also... getting something out of this, so.
...Please don't keep things bottled up inside, okay? Uncle.
Thank you, that kindness of yours is always so soothing.
But I think I'm at my limit.
If I do any more of this stuff to you...
I really might lose control over myself.
And that really would be an embarrassing prospect.
Erhm... so what do you... mean by that... exactly?
I mean that... I'll end up wanting to have sex, with you.
Even just touching you like that today, made me realize it.
"I want to take her, I want to push her down".
You've done a lot for me until now.
I remember how this started with just pictures of you, too. Even though that
should have been more than enough... a man's desires really are foolish.
--Now I can't help but want even more.
Hahahah. It's a repulsive thought, isn't it?
I'm sure my son would say the same thing.
I really should be thinking and feeling the same way as he's saying. And yet.
If you come here again, I really will lose all my remaining
reason and rationality as a human being.
So let's end it here... and next time--
---Uncle without his reason and rationality, huh?
...I wonder just what he'd do to me?
What do I do? What do I do...
